---
title: "UrbanSim Output Processor"
author: "Conor Gately"
format: html
editor: source
---

# 1 - Setup: paths and parameters

```{r, setup, include=FALSE}

pacman::p_load(
  sf,
  data.table,
  tidycensus,
  tidyverse,
  openxlsx
)

# devtools::install_github('MAPC/mapcdatakeys')
library(mapcdatakeys)

# Paths
if (grepl('VM',Sys.info()[['nodename']])){
  base <- '//data-sync/Public/DataServices'
} else {
  base <- 'S:/Network Shares/K Drive/DataServices'
}


data_path <- file.path(base,'Projects/Current_Projects/Environment/EEA_MLCA/Data/UrbanSim')

project_gdb <- file.path(base, 'Projects/Current_Projects/Environment/EEA_MLCA/Data/Spatial/EEA_MLCA.gdb')

proj_gpkg <- file.path(base, 'Projects/Current_Projects/Environment/EEA_MLCA/Data/Spatial/EEA_MLCA.gpkg')

scen = 'Scen_0'

years=c(2019, 2024, 2029, 2034)
# years=c(2019, 2024, 2029, 2034, 2039, 2044, 2049)

# Municipalities
munis <- all_muni_data_keys |> 
  select(muni_id, rpa_acr, mpo) |> 
  setDT()

# Existing setup (non-scenario)
MAPCM_run <- 'run_228'
SWM_run <- 'state_run_135'

# Conservation Test

# years <- c(2011,2012,2013,2014)
# scen='Conservation_test'
# MAPCM_run <- 'run_234'
# scen_gdb <- paste0(base, '/Projects/Current_Projects/Environment/EEA_MLCA/Data/UrbanSim/',scen,'/',scen,'.gdb')

# 2010 Blocks
blk_2010 <- geog_xw_2010 |> 
  left_join(munis, by = 'muni_id') |> 
  select(bl10_id, muni_id, muni_name, rpa_acr, mpo) |> 
  setDT()

mapc_blks <- blk_2010 |> filter(rpa_acr!='MAPC') |> pull(bl10_id)
  
blk10_sf <- mapcdatakeys::block_sf(2010) |> 
  left_join(munis, by='muni_id')

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = data_path)
```

# 2 - Census Block Outputs

```{r}

# Base year existing housing unit capacity levels


for (yr in c(2019)) {
  dt.mapc <- fread(paste0(
    data_path,
    '/Current/MAPC/results_mapc_',
    MAPCM_run,
    '_block_indicators_',yr,'.csv'
  )) |> select(
    block_id,
    residential_unit_capacity,
    total_residential_units,
    vacant_residential_units,
    ru_vacancy_rate,
    total_households,
    density_households,
    unavailable_units,
    acres
  ) |>
    mutate(
      year = yr,
      bl10_id = as.character(block_id),
      residential_unit_capacity = round(residential_unit_capacity),
      available_unit_capacity = residential_unit_capacity - total_residential_units,
      cap_pct = round(100 * total_residential_units / residential_unit_capacity, 2)
    ) |>
    mutate(cap_pct = case_when(is.infinite(cap_pct) ~ 100, 
                               is.na(cap_pct) ~ 0,
                               .default = cap_pct)) |>
    left_join(blk.sf, by = 'bl10_id')

  # Statewide Model Outputs
  
    dt.swm <- fread(paste0(
    data_path,
    '/Current/SWM/results_mapc_',
    SWM_run,
    '_block_indicators_',yr,'.csv'
  )) |> select(
    block_id,
    residential_unit_capacity,
    total_residential_units,
    vacant_residential_units,
    ru_vacancy_rate,
    total_households,
    density_households,
    unavailable_units,
    acres
  ) |>
    mutate(
      year = yr,
      bl10_id = as.character(block_id),
      residential_unit_capacity = round(residential_unit_capacity),
      available_unit_capacity = residential_unit_capacity - total_residential_units,
      cap_pct = round(100 * total_residential_units / residential_unit_capacity, 2)
    ) |>
    mutate(cap_pct = case_when(is.infinite(cap_pct) ~ 100, 
                               is.na(cap_pct) ~ 0,
                               .default = cap_pct)) |>
    left_join(blk.sf, by = 'bl10_id') |> 
    filter(rpa_acr!='MAPC')
    
  dt.comb <- rbind(dt.mapc,dt.swm)
  st_write(dt.comb, 
           dsn = project_gdb, 
           layer = paste0('urbansim_current_block_developed_capacities_',yr))
  
  st_write(dt.comb, 
           dsn = gpkg, 
           layer = paste0('urbansim_current_block_developed_capacities_',yr))
  
}


```

# 4 - UrbanSim Block Indicator Compile

```{r}

swm.hh <- blk10_sf |> filter(!bl10_id %in% mapc_blks)

swm.blk <- blk10_sf |> filter(!bl10_id %in% mapc_blks)

for (run in SWM_run) {
  for (yr in years) {
    dt <- fread(
      paste0(
        data_path,
        '/',
        scen,
        '/SWM/results_mapc_',
        run,
        '_block_indicators_',
        yr,
        '.csv'
      )
    ) |> 
      filter(!block_id %in% mapc_blks) |> 
      setDT()
    
    dt[, year := yr + 1]
    
    dt <- dt[, .(
      year,
      block_id,
      muni_id,
      total_households,
      hh_owners,
      hh_renters,
      total_residential_units,
      single_fam,
      multi_fam,
      residential_unit_capacity,
      density_residential_units,
      unavailable_units,
      vacant_residential_units,
      ru_vacancy_rate,
      own_fam,
      rent_fam,
      own_single_fam,
      own_multi_fam,
      rent_single_fam,
      rent_multi_fam,
      sum_with_child,
      median_income,
      median_rent,
      median_value,
      income_35000l,
      income_35001_75000,
      income_75001_125000,
      income_125001_200000,
      income_200001p,
      workers_0,
      workers_1,
      workers_2,
      workers_3,
      workers_4p,
      total_jobs,
      density_jobs,
      jobs_aggr_sector_1,
      jobs_aggr_sector_2,
      jobs_aggr_sector_3,
      jobs_aggr_sector_4,
      jobs_aggr_sector_5,
      jobs_aggr_sector_6,
      jobs_aggr_sector_7,
      jobs_aggr_sector_8,
      jobs_aggr_sector_9,
      jobs_aggr_sector_10
    )]
    
    setnames(
      dt,
      collapse::.c(
        year,
        block_id_2010,
        muni_id,
        total_households,
        owner_households,
        renter_households,
        total_residential_units,
        single_fam_units,
        multi_fam_units,
        residential_unit_capacity,
        residential_units_per_acre,
        unavailable_units,
        vacant_residential_units,
        vacancy_rate,
        owner_units,
        renter_units,
        owner_single_fam_units,
        owner_multi_fam_units,
        renter_single_fam_units,
        renter_multi_fam_units,
        households_with_children,
        median_household_income,
        median_household_rent,
        median_home_value,
        households_income_under35000,
        households_income_35001_75000,
        households_income_75001_125000,
        households_income_125001_200000,
        households_income_over200001,
        households_with_workers_0,
        households_with_workers_1,
        households_with_workers_2,
        households_with_workers_3,
        households_with_workers_4plus,
        total_jobs,
        jobs_per_acre,
        jobs_aggr_sector_1,
        jobs_aggr_sector_2,
        jobs_aggr_sector_3,
        jobs_aggr_sector_4,
        jobs_aggr_sector_5,
        jobs_aggr_sector_6,
        jobs_aggr_sector_7,
        jobs_aggr_sector_8,
        jobs_aggr_sector_9,
        jobs_aggr_sector_10
      )
    )
    dt[, residential_unit_capacity := round(residential_unit_capacity)]
    dt[, residential_units_per_acre := round(residential_units_per_acre, 3)]
    dt[, jobs_per_acre := round(jobs_per_acre, 3)]
    dt[, median_household_income := round(median_household_income)]
    dt[, median_household_rent := round(median_household_rent)]
    dt[, median_home_value := round(median_home_value)]
    dt[, vacancy_rate := round(vacancy_rate, 2)]
    setorder(dt, block_id_2010)
    
    fwrite(dt,
           paste0(
             data_path,
             '/',
             scen,
             '/',
             scen,
             '_SWM_block_indicators_',
             yr + 1,
             '.csv'
           ))
    
    # Export as spatial layer
    dt[, bl10_id := as.character(block_id_2010)]
    dt.sf <- swm.blk |>
      left_join(dt, by = 'bl10_id') |>
      select(-muni_id.y, -block_id_2010) |>
      rename(muni_id = muni_id.x)
    
dt.hh <- dt |> 
  select(bl10_id,total_households) |> 
  setnames('total_households',paste0('total_households_',yr+1))

swm.hh <- left_join(swm.hh, dt.hh, by='bl10_id')

  }
}

# Run MAPC 101 data

mapcm.hh <- blk10_sf |> filter(bl10_id %in% mapc_blks)

sub.blk <- blk10_sf |> filter(bl10_id %in% mapc_blks)


for (run in MAPCM_run) {
  for (yr in years) {
    dt <- fread(
      paste0(
        data_path,
        '/',
        scen,
        '/MAPC/results_mapc_',
        run,
        '_block_indicators_',
        yr,
        '.csv'
      )
    )
    
    dt[, year := yr + 1]
    
    dt <- dt[, .(
      year,
      block_id,
      muni_id,
      total_households,
      hh_owners,
      hh_renters,
      total_residential_units,
      single_fam,
      multi_fam,
      residential_unit_capacity,
      density_residential_units,
      unavailable_units,
      vacant_residential_units,
      ru_vacancy_rate,
      own_fam,
      rent_fam,
      own_single_fam,
      own_multi_fam,
      rent_single_fam,
      rent_multi_fam,
      sum_with_child,
      median_income,
      median_rent,
      median_value,
      income_35000l,
      income_35001_75000,
      income_75001_125000,
      income_125001_200000,
      income_200001p,
      workers_0,
      workers_1,
      workers_2,
      workers_3,
      workers_4p,
      total_jobs,
      density_jobs,
      jobs_aggr_sector_1,
      jobs_aggr_sector_2,
      jobs_aggr_sector_3,
      jobs_aggr_sector_4,
      jobs_aggr_sector_5,
      jobs_aggr_sector_6,
      jobs_aggr_sector_7,
      jobs_aggr_sector_8,
      jobs_aggr_sector_9,
      jobs_aggr_sector_10
    )]
    
    setnames(
      dt,
      collapse::.c(
        year,
        block_id_2010,
        muni_id,
        total_households,
        owner_households,
        renter_households,
        total_residential_units,
        single_fam_units,
        multi_fam_units,
        residential_unit_capacity,
        residential_units_per_acre,
        unavailable_units,
        vacant_residential_units,
        vacancy_rate,
        owner_units,
        renter_units,
        owner_single_fam_units,
        owner_multi_fam_units,
        renter_single_fam_units,
        renter_multi_fam_units,
        households_with_children,
        median_household_income,
        median_household_rent,
        median_home_value,
        households_income_under35000,
        households_income_35001_75000,
        households_income_75001_125000,
        households_income_125001_200000,
        households_income_over200001,
        households_with_workers_0,
        households_with_workers_1,
        households_with_workers_2,
        households_with_workers_3,
        households_with_workers_4plus,
        total_jobs,
        jobs_per_acre,
        jobs_aggr_sector_1,
        jobs_aggr_sector_2,
        jobs_aggr_sector_3,
        jobs_aggr_sector_4,
        jobs_aggr_sector_5,
        jobs_aggr_sector_6,
        jobs_aggr_sector_7,
        jobs_aggr_sector_8,
        jobs_aggr_sector_9,
        jobs_aggr_sector_10
      )
    )
    dt[, residential_unit_capacity := round(residential_unit_capacity)]
    dt[, residential_units_per_acre := round(residential_units_per_acre, 3)]
    dt[, jobs_per_acre := round(jobs_per_acre, 3)]
    dt[, median_household_income := round(median_household_income)]
    dt[, median_household_rent := round(median_household_rent)]
    dt[, median_home_value := round(median_home_value)]
    dt[, vacancy_rate := round(vacancy_rate, 2)]
    setorder(dt, block_id_2010)
    
    fwrite(dt,
           paste0(
             data_path,
             '/',
             scen,
             '/',
             scen,
             '_MAPCM_block_indicators_',
             yr + 1,
             '.csv'
           ))
    
    # Export as spatial layer
    dt[, bl10_id := as.character(block_id_2010)]
    dt.sf <- sub.blk |>
      left_join(dt, by = 'bl10_id') |>
      select(-muni_id.y, -block_id_2010) |>
      rename(muni_id = muni_id.x)
    
dt.hh <- dt |> 
  select(bl10_id,total_households) |> 
  setnames('total_households',paste0('total_households_',yr+1))

mapcm.hh <- left_join(mapcm.hh, dt.hh, by='bl10_id')

  }
}

setDT(swm.hh)
setDT(mapcm.hh)

m2 <- rbind(swm.hh,mapcm.hh)
m2[is.na(m2)] <- 0
setorder(m2,bl10_id)

sf.hh <- st_as_sf(m2,crs=26986)

st_write(sf.hh,
         dsn = project_gdb,
         layer = paste0(scen, '_households_by_block_5yr_',min(years)+1,'_to_',max(years)+1),
         append = FALSE)


```

# Excel format outputs

```{r}
# Prep output excel workbook
wrapStyle <- createStyle(wrapText = TRUE)
boldStyle <- createStyle(textDecoration = "Bold")
blk.hh <- createWorkbook()

for (yr in years) {
    mp <- fread(
      paste0(
             data_path,
             '/',
             scen,
             '/',
             scen,
             '_MAPCM_block_indicators_',
             yr + 1,
             '.csv'
           ))
    sw <- fread(
      paste0(
             data_path,
             '/',
             scen,
             '/',
             scen,
             '_SWM_block_indicators_',
             yr + 1,
             '.csv'
           ))
    dt <- rbind(mp,sw)
    
addWorksheet(blk.hh, sheetName = paste(scen, yr+1, sep = '_'))
writeData(blk.hh, sheet = paste(scen, yr+1, sep = '_'), x = dt)

}

# Styles for sheet
setColWidths(
  blk.hh,
  cols = 1:ncol(dt),
  sheet = paste(scen, yr + 1, sep = '_'),
  widths = "auto"
)
addStyle(
  blk.hh,
  sheet = paste(scen, yr + 1, sep = '_'),
  style = boldStyle,
  cols = 1:ncol(dt),
  rows = 1,
  gridExpand = TRUE
)

# Employment Sector Aggregation Metadata
meta <- data.table(
  employment_aggregation = seq(1, 10),
  sector_description = c(
    'Construction',
    'Education and Health Services',
    'Financial Activities',
    'Government',
    'Information',
    'Leisure and Hospitality',
    'Manufacturing',
    'Mining and Logging / Other Services',
    'Professional and Business Services',
    'Trade, Transportation, Utilities'
  )
)
# 
addWorksheet(blk.hh, sheetName = 'employment sector metadata')
writeData(blk.hh, sheet = 'employment sector metadata', x = meta)

# Styles for sheet
setColWidths(
  blk.hh,
  cols=1:ncol(meta),
  sheet = 'employment sector metadata',
  widths = "auto"
)
addStyle(
  blk.hh,
  sheet = 'employment sector metadata',
  style = boldStyle,
  cols=1:ncol(meta),
  rows = 1,
  gridExpand = TRUE
)

saveWorkbook(blk.hh, paste0(data_path,'/',scen,'/',scen, '_block_indicators.xlsx'), overwrite = T)


```




# Deprecated
```{r}
# # Check raw household totals by segment against control totals
# ctrl <- fread(paste0(data_path,'/',scen,'/MAPC_Household_Control_Totals_SHoP_Scenario_3_pop_corrected.csv'))
# 
# d11 <- fread(paste0(data_path,'/',scen,'/2011/households.csv')) |> 
#   mutate(
#     inc_grp=case_when(
#     income<=35000 ~ 1,
#     income>35000 & income<=75000 ~ 2,
#     income>75000 & income<=125000 ~ 3,
#     income>125000 & income<=225000 ~ 4,
#     income>225000 ~ 5
#   ),
#   age_grp=case_when(
#     age_of_head>=15 & age_of_head<=35 ~ 1,
#     age_of_head>35 & age_of_head<=45 ~ 2,
#     age_of_head>45 & age_of_head<=65 ~ 3,
#     age_of_head>65 & age_of_head<=75 ~ 4,
#     age_of_head>75 ~ 5
#   ),
#   hhsize = case_when(
#     persons<=4 ~ persons,
#     .default=4
#   ),
#   child = case_when(
#     children==0 ~ 0,
#     .default=1
#   )
#   ) |>
#   setDT()
# 
# d11[,.N,.(age_grp,inc_grp,hhsize)]
# ctrl[year==2011,.N,.(age_of_head_max,income_max,persons_max,children_min)]
# 


```
